title: MuslinZ 6pk Baby Muslin Squares Burp Cloths, Muslins for Baby, 100% Pure Soft Cotton 70x70cm (Yellow Star)
features: 100% Pure cotton - Ultra absorbent, hardwearing, versatile and wonderfully soft for your baby’s delicate skin.
description: Product Description Designed in the UK At MuslinZ, we found that the muslin squares available were lacking in quality, so we decided to design our own. Our muslins are well known for their reliability for parents in the UK and worldwide. Our Classic Muslin Square Essential for all parents and their babies. MuslinZ muslin squares are designed with quality in mind which makes them perfect to use and look great wash after wash. The many features of the MuslinZ muslin are: Machine Washable at 40c - Wash before use Extremely Soft - the more you wash them the softer they get Maintains Shape and Texture - due to the quality fabric Fine Weave - for excellent absorbency and so they are not see through for using as a cover up when feeding 70x70 cm Sizing - a great size for so many uses MuslinZ 6 Pack Multi Purpose Muslin Squares Our classic 100% cotton muslins can be used as newborn reusable cloth nappies, covers for breast feeding, burp cloths, changing mat covers, newborn swaddles and baby comforters MuslinZ 6pk Baby Muslin Squares, Burp Cloths, Muslin Cloths for Baby, Breastf...
